Video.summary: Emeril and young chef CJ Calhoun make a meal any kid would love!
Video.title: with CJ Calhoun, Dominique Taylor

Video.summary: Emeril's in the kitchen to help you bring the best breakfast to the table. Plus, recipes: Kicked-Up Coffee, Fluffy Biscuits with Sausage Gravy, and more.
Video.title: Entertaining with Emeril

Video.summary: Tired of the same old chicken recipes? Emeril's prepares two exciting new chicken recipes: tagine of chicken with preserved lemons and olives and prosciutto- chicken roulade served with chard
Video.title: Chicken with a Twist

Video.summary: For your next get together, punch up the menu with Emeril's coffee-inspired recipes!
Video.title: New Orleans Coffee

Video.summary: Emeril whips up Big Freedia's favorite southern meal.
Video.title: with Big Freedia

Video.summary: Emeril highlights Asian-American communities who value Morning Glory, a highly invasive vegetable grown only by special permission.
Video.title: Illegal Greens: Morning Glory

Video.summary: Treat guests to Emeril's collard greens recipes, inspired by Farmer Jones' fresh produce.
Video.title: Collard Greens For All

Video.summary: Any time of year is a great time for a cookout! Join Emeril for grilled rack of lamb with mixed-herb pesto and a side of grilled potatoes with feta
Video.title: Grill It Up!

Video.summary: Oyster Shooters, Steamed Blue Crabs, Citrus-Crusted Tuna with Beer Sauce
Video.title: Maryland by the Sea

Video.summary: Emeril is going back to the basics. Whether you're a novice cook or an advanced chef, you'll love these recipes: vegetable soup, and roast chicken served with roasted root vegetables
Video.title: Back to Basics: Cooking School 101

Video.summary: Tomato and Potato Tart, Potato Gnocchi with Gorgonzola Sauce, Andouille Potato Cakes, Crispy Sea Bass with Confit of Yukon Gold Potatoes, Pancetta and Sweet Peas In Chicago
Video.title: Potatoes (In Chicago)

Video.summary: With the help of Fleisher's Grass-Fed and Organic Meats butchers, Emeril prepares seared tri-tip steak with bearnaise sauce and grilled flat-iron steak with avocado, tomato, and red onion salad
Video.title: Butchers' Favorite Cuts

Video.summary: Emeril prepares healthy kids' meals: baked chicken fingers with creamy dreamy dipping sauce, edamame with sesame oil, and hot and hearty minestrone soup. Both kids and parents will love these dishes!
Video.title: Healthy Kids' Meals

Video.summary: Emeril shares his burger favorites: buffalo burgers with bacon, cheese, and fresh thyme and Emeril's turkey burgers with cilantro mayonnaise
Video.title: Hamburger 101

Video.summary: Parsnip Cakes with Smoked Trout, Apple and Horseradish Cream, Root Cellar Gratin, Venison Medallions with Celery Root-Pear Puree, Sweet Potato Spice Cake
Video.title: The Root Cellar

Video.summary: Emeril's Mint Julep, Grilled Lamb Patties with White Bean and Mint Relish, Peppermint Ice Cream, Peppermint and Chocolate Ice Cream Bomb
Video.title: Mint, Mint and More Mint

Video.summary: Cozy up with Emeril's warming and comforting classics, including hearty chicken pot pie topped with puff-pastry crust and Emeril's super-tasty spicy meatloaf
Video.title: Comforting Classics

Video.summary: A trip to a farmer's market inspired Emeril to present creamy turnip and parsnip soup. Plus, roasted chicken breasts with roasted acorn squash, braised pears, and pear cider reduction
Video.title: Cooking Local, Cooking Fresh

Video.summary: Pea Soup, Deep-Dish Meat Pie, Sugar Pie
Video.title: French Canadian Cuisine

Video.summary: Turkey Bolognese, Duck and Sausage Etouffee, Emeril's Chicken Pot Pies
Video.title: Home Cookin'

Video.summary: Vodka and Citrus Cured Salmon, Mini Open-Faced Corn Cake and Salmon Salad Sandwiches, Funky Southwestern Turkey, Rhubarb and Apple Pie with Walnut Crumb Topping
Video.title: Prime Time Emeril

Video.summary: Caldo Verde, Salt Cod, Onions and Potatoes, Tripe O'Porto Style
Video.title: Food of Porto (Portugal)

Video.summary: Pimento and Bacon Clams, Salt Cod and Lobster Cakes with Roasted Corn Relish and Classic Tartar Sauce, Blueberry Jam and Custard Pie
Video.title: New England Fare

Video.summary: A hearty dinner spread with pork roast, mashed potatoes and angel food cake.
Video.title: Sunday Dinners

Video.summary: Jillie's Pesto Dip; Marinated Mushroom Salad; Alden's Grandmother's Meat and Potato Casserole; Jessie's Big Chocolate Chip Cookies
Video.title: Our Family Traditions

Video.summary: Aloo Palak, Skordalia with Fried Calamari, Steak Frites, Shepherd's Pie
Video.title: World Famous Potatoes

Video.summary: Essence, Seafood and Sausage Pasta with Essence Cream, Fresh Herb Tart, Lamb Stew with Herbs de Provence, Anise Biscotti with Lemon Ice Cream
Video.title: Herbs and Spices

Video.summary: Fried Redfish with Fire Roasted Corn Tartar Sauce, Jalapeno Hush Puppies, Maw Maw's Slaw, Rustic Blackberry Cobbler
Video.title: Fish Fry

Video.summary: Warm Spinach Salad with Roasted Pecan and Bacon Dressing with Goat Cheese Cake; Spinach and Shrimp Quiche with Cornmeal Crust.
Video.title: Fresh Spinach

Video.summary: Lamb Sausage with Lentil Ragu, Funky Lamb Shanks
Video.title: New Lamb

Video.summary: Rosemary Flatbread, Rosemary Lamb Skewers, White Bean, Tomato and Rosemary Ragu
Video.title: Fresh Rosemary

Video.summary: Grilled Fish with Fresh Pea Sauce, Peas and Pasta, Risi Bisi
Video.title: Spring Peas

Video.summary: Fish and Chips, Basil Mayonnaise
Video.title: Fall River Memories
